question: Given the performance metrics for September 2017, what strategic insight can be drawn regarding the primary drivers of customer dissatisfaction compared to logistics performance?
expected_answer: While the logistics team maintained a relatively low late delivery rate of 4.39% (182 orders), the total of 529 negative reviews suggests that shipping delays are not the sole cause of poor customer feedback. This discrepancy indicates that factors beyond delivery speed, such as product quality in the popular bed_bath_table category or the impact of freight costs which represent approximately 11.7% of the average payment value, are likely influencing the average review score of 4.19.
